title: Benjamin Osgood Peirce
body: Benjamin Osgood Peirce (February 11, 1854 – January 14, 1914) was an American mathematician and a holder of the Hollis Chair of Mathematicks and Natural Philosophy at Harvard from 1888 until his death in 1914.
